summary: Python script demonstrates solid practices: type hints, immutable dataclass, timezone-aware datetimes, proper error handling. Workflow has issues: (1) actions use major-version pins (v4, v5) instead of full commit SHAs per best practice; (2) references non-existent fixtures/artifacts.json—will fail at runtime; (3) fixture path has no validation/fallback. Critical: act-result.txt missing—task explicitly requires all tests run through act and this artifact saved. Workflow was not validated to actually execute via act.
